creator: supportme@ukr.net
text:
(In reply to Michael Tuexen from comment #62)

Option was added to sysctl.conf, system rebooted, after reboot it definetly was checked:
sysctl net.inet.tcp.tcp_pcap_packets
net.inet.tcp.tcp_pcap_packets: 10

Going to set net.inet.tcp.tcp_pcap_packets=30 for sure. Waiting for new core.

Offtop: meantime kernel was rebilt without INVARIANTS to continue running without panicing, but logging. Hope results would be helpful too:
